title: Access Controller
description:
In the properties of the access control block the 1-wire Extension that has got the iButton reader connected must be selected. Select which user groups have got access permissions and also set the times for each group. (Periphery tree > user groups)
(Sel) input to identify the iButton reader if multiple are connected to the same 1-Wire Extension. Following a pulse on (Sel) the permissions for this block are used to verify the identity of the iButton for the duration of (Dsel)

inputs.description: Pulse to select access controller (when using multiple access controllers)
This External Authentication ID can be provided e.g. by a fingerprint through a virtual input. This ID must be present in the user authentication.
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input.

outputs.description: Activates output for the duration set in parameter (Pd) when permission is given.
Activates output for the duration set in parameter (Pd) when permission is denied.

parameters.description: If (Dsel) = 0 the authentication check is carried out immediately, (Sel) is not used.

properties.description: The following devices are supported: Loxone Intercom 1-wire extension Devices with 1-wire interface
